//: Type-checks the custom service worker (src/pwa/sw.ts) in isolation. It needs the WebWorker lib (ServiceWorkerGlobalScope, clients, skipWaiting) instead of DOM, so it cannot share the app's tsconfig.json — which is why sw.ts is excluded there and checked here. vite-plugin-pwa bundles the worker itself; this config only adds the missing type coverage.
//exclude: Clear the base config's exclude (which lists sw.ts itself) so this config can include it.
